advisoryWriteFix: memory_followup selection implementation/recommendation now writes advisory topic, summary, assumptions, recommendation, and risks.
monthlyReadinessContinuity: do you think it will work
priorityRepair: Safety and trace/model status remain first; explicit live-record inventory now precedes casual/advisor/opportunity/memory/fallback routes.

browser.detail: The application requires authenticated admin sign-in; no credentials were used or exposed.
